## [12:11 - 12:44]

And you know, there's something as well else worth considering as you grow out your account So the next video i'm going to show you the actual rules, but for this one The big takeaway is setting up your reports One for your winners one for your losers and then using the process to check in on it once a day If you're doing higher volume, obviously you can do it more frequently if you're doing your lower volume Maybe less frequently but for where we are right now every morning One of the first things my media buys will do is to check to see whether we have winners or losers and to make an action off of that
